narrative:
Athens County has 34,618 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.4%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 16.5 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 25.4% of registrants.
